general_news.title: 被控威脅川普生命 前FBI局長柯米到案出庭
general_news.summary: 前美國聯邦調查局（FBI）局長柯米（James Comey）因被控在社群媒體貼文威脅總統川普的生命，今天向維吉尼亞州當局...

general_news.title: 被控威脅川普生命　前FBI局長柯米到案出庭
general_news.summary: （中央社華盛頓29日綜合外電報導）前美國聯邦調查局（FBI）局長柯米（James Comey）因被控在社群媒體貼文威脅總統川普的生命，今天向維吉尼亞州當局投案並出庭應訊。

general_news.title: '8647' got James Comey indicted. What exactly does it mean?
general_news.summary: A grand jury charged Comey with threatening Trump's life through his since-deleted 2025 post of seashells forming "8647." Trump is the 47th president, and the term "86" has a few possible meanings.

general_news.title: James Comey charged with threatening Trump's life in ‘8647’ seashell post
general_news.summary: Trump had accused the former FBI Director Comey of "calling for the assassination of the president" by sharing the image of the numbers in an Instagram post.

general_news.title: Grand jury indicts former FBI director James Comey for a second time
general_news.summary: The case revolves around a photo the former FBI director posted online last year of seashells on a beach arranged to say "8647."
